internal_comment: Likely overestimates presences in the Baltic.
Underestimates the distribution in the Baltic.

Dramatically overestimates in the Baltic Proper and Gulf of Bothnia where it does not occur. This is caused by overprediction in the GAM models.
Underestimates the distribution in the Baltic.
Overestimates in the central and northern Baltic.
Overestimates in the Baltic, although with low confidence. Caused by the GAM.
Underestimates in the Baltic and GoB. Probably not caught well with gillnets.
Likely underestimates overall, but main geographical distribution is reasonable.
Underestimates in the Baltic, especially in coastal areas.
